calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-22-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-22-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Rita Howell.
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: Citibank South Dakota, N.A.
Declaration of Plaintiff's Witness: Ramona Chavez, in lieu of live testimony at trial, filed and entered on April 24, 2006.
No appearance by the Defendant: Jason Samose.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Jason Samose as follows:
Damages $7,343.93
Attorney's Fees $1,075.00
Costs $203.30, for a Total of $8,622.23
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2006 Set For Trial On May-22-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2006 Off Calendar
